# 一：题目类型
RSA；已知n,p,q
# 二：题目

p =

# 三：解题思路与代码
### 方法一：
很简单的rsa，签到题争取一血。
```python
from Crypto.Util.number import*
from gmpy2 import*

p = 

q = 

n = 

e = 65537
c = 

  
phi = (p - 1) * (q - 1)
d = inverse(e, phi)
m = pow(c, d, n)
print(long_to_bytes(m))
```
